strategy_decisions.rationale: This broadened drive-continuation expression produced 0 trades on valid data, which is a hard red flag. Even after relaxing the session idea into a 4h-compatible drive-and-hold structure, the setup remained participation-sparse and does not justify another rescue attempt.

The flush-and-reclaim continuation concept never engaged on valid data. In this fully choppy brief, the exact reclaim-continuation lane expression still failed to participate, so the honest diagnosis is excessive sparsity rather than something worth cosmetic refinement.

This runner concept also produced 0 trades on valid data. The expansion detector plus persistence confirmation stack still assigned too much directional responsibility to overlapping components, leaving the setup over-constrained for the chosen lane.
